overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking through a snowy mountain pass at dusk. The character approaches and passes a colossal statue with raised arms, continuing along a path lined with burning braziers. The atmosphere is dark and foreboding with an orange sky and misty visibility.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain valley under an orange dusk sky. The armored character walks forward along a snow-covered trail, approaching a colossal statue with raised arms visible in the distance. Rocky cliffs flank both sides of the path.

events.description: passing the colossal statue, which recedes to the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path past the monument, heading deeper into the mountain pass

entered.detail: small burning fire pit emitting orange flame and smoke on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the colossal statue, which moves to the left and recedes into the background. The path continues through the snowy mountains, and a small lit brazier becomes visible on the right side of the trail, providing warm light against the cold environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path with wooden bonfire structure

events.description: a large wooden bonfire structure with multiple flames comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large burning wooden structure while continuing up the snowy slope

entered.detail: wooden platform structure with multiple burning fires and stacked logs

segments.scene_description: Approaching a large wooden bonfire structure burning brightly on the left side of the path. The character walks past the structure, which illuminates the immediate snowy area with flickering firelight. The path continues ascending through the rocky mountain terrain under the orange sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain pass that transitions from a wide, desolate valley into a path illuminated by flickering fires. It begins with an armored character walking along a snow-covered trail under an orange dusk sky, flanked by rocky cliffs and heading toward a colossal statue with raised arms. As the character passes the statue, the figure recedes into the background to the left, and the cold environment is first punctuated by the warm glow of a small lit brazier on the right. The scene then shifts toward a large, brightly burning wooden bonfire structure on the left, which casts flickering light across the immediate snow as the character moves past it. Finally, the camera continues to follow the character as the path ascends further into the rocky mountain terrain under the deepening orange sky.
